title: Agent design notes for practical tool use
author: ReCollect sample
rawContent: A practical set of notes on agent design: begin with one narrow task, define the tool boundary, record each action, and make failure states visible. Use small evaluations before adding more tools or autonomy.

title: How to evaluate a small AI workflow
author: r/AI_Agents
rawContent: A lightweight evaluation plan for an AI workflow: write down ten representative tasks, define what a correct answer looks like, run the same set after each change, and inspect failures rather than relying on a single impressive example.
